messages.content: Build a pure Decider for an Order aggregate in TypeScript. Export initialState, decide, and evolve. Use discriminated unions for Command, Event, and State. Throw a typed DomainError when placing an order twice.
Write a Decider for a Delivery aggregate covering dispatch, deliver, and fail. Delivering a failed delivery must throw. Include evolve with an exhaustive never default.
Explain briefly how a pure Decider differs from a CRUD service, then implement one for an Inventory aggregate with receive, reserve, and release commands. Reserving more than on-hand must throw.
Implement a Decider for a Tenant aggregate with onboard, suspend, and reactivate commands. Cannot reactivate a tenant that was never suspended. Strict types, no any.
Build a Decider for a Booking aggregate covering request, confirm, and cancel. Cancelling a confirmed booking is allowed; cancelling a cancelled one must throw. Use pure decide + evolve.
Write a Decider for a Flight aggregate covering schedule, board, and takeoff. Boarding a flight that already took off must throw. TypeScript with discriminated unions.
Build a projection with a when reducer for an Order view that denormalises customer and total. Use an aggregateStream helper to fold events into the view.
Implement a projection that folds Inventory events into a low-stock dashboard view. Ignore events outside the view's interest and handle the rest exhaustively.
What's the idiomatic way to build a read model for a Manifest aggregate that counts parcels per carrier? Show a minimal projection with an exhaustive switch.
Write a projection for a Booking dashboard view that tracks pending, confirmed, and cancelled counts. Show how to fold a Booking event stream into the view.
Implement a snapshot-with-versioned-upgrade loader for a Delivery aggregate. CURRENT_VERSION is 3, with v1-to-v2 and v2-to-v3 upgraders. TypeScript, strict types.
Show the pattern for upgrading an older Tenant snapshot into the current shape. CURRENT_VERSION is 2, include a single upgrader, and return the upgraded Snapshot.
Build a Snapshot loader for a Flight aggregate with three upgrader steps (v1->v2, v2->v3, v3->v4). CURRENT_VERSION is 4. Strict types, no any.
Refactor an unsafe blind-append to use optimistic concurrency via expectedRevision. The aggregate is an Order. Use a local EventStore interface and surface a typed ConcurrencyConflict.
Add optimistic-concurrency write support to this Inventory command handler. The handler must read the current revision, append with expectedRevision, and convert conflict signals into a typed error.
Write a command-handler function for a Manifest aggregate that guards against stale writes with expectedRevision. Use a local EventStore interface.
Implement a generic CommandHandler factory that takes a Decider and returns both a Promise-based and an Effect.gen variant. Use a local EventStore interface.
Build a CommandHandler over an EventStore for an Order aggregate. Load current state via readStream, call decide, then appendToStream with expectedRevision. Use Effect.gen.
Write a CommandHandler for a Booking aggregate that loads the stream, calls decide, and appends events. Use a local EventStore interface. No business logic in the handler.
Build a type-safe CommandHandler factory that returns an Effect for a Flight aggregate. Load via readStream, decide, appendToStream.

Explain how a checkpointed subscription works in event sourcing, then implement a runSubscription that reads the last checkpoint, consumes events, projects them, and writes the checkpoint only after each successful apply.
Add resumable checkpointing to this polling subscription for a Delivery read model. The CheckpointStore must expose read and write; writes must happen after successful projection apply.
Implement a generic aggregateStream<S, E> helper that folds an AsyncIterable of events into an aggregate state. Show a worked example with an Inventory aggregate.
Write a when-based reducer for a Tenant aggregate that folds a flat event array into state. Include an exhaustive switch with a never default.
Build a generic aggregateStream that reconstructs Order state from an event array. Include the evolve reducer and the initial state as a literal.
Show how to use a when reducer plus aggregateStream to fold Flight events into a lightweight summary object. Strict types, never default.
Build a rebuild function that wipes and re-projects an Inventory read model from revision 0 in chunked batches. Accept a from option to resume after a crash.
Write a resumable rebuild for an Order dashboard read model. It should read events in batches, project, persist, and advance a cursor; progress reporting via callback.

Build a minimal CQRS boundary for a Tenant aggregate: handleCommand uses a Decider and EventStore; queryView reads from a separate read store. The two sides share the event type but not the state type.
Show a CQRS split for a Booking aggregate. The write side goes through a Decider and appendToStream; the read side queries a separate ViewStore populated eventually by projections.
Implement an integration-event translation for a Delivery domain. Map DeliveryDelivered and DeliveryFailed to versioned IntegrationEvents; internal events must translate to null.
Write an outbox pattern for Order events: atomically append events and integration-event rows in one transaction. Use a local Transaction interface; describe the publisher's role in a comment.
Refactor this legacy update into an idiomatic event-sourcing write: load via readStream, call decide, then appendToStream. The aggregate is Delivery.
Targeted fix: this Inventory decide function is missing its never default and mutates state. Rewrite it purely with an exhaustive switch.
Add a capability to this Pallet aggregate decider: support a "reweigh" command that emits a PalletReweighed event if the new weight differs from the last known weight.
